data.title: Divi Resorts Introduces Sweet Summer Savings with Special Low Rates Across the Caribbean
data.description: Experience the Caribbean at budget-friendly rates with the latest promotion by Divi Resorts. Take advantage of the limited-time offer with summer rates as low as $164/night for trips up to October 31, 2026. This deal is perfect for those looking to enjoy a tropical getaway without breaking the bank. Chapel Hill, North Carolina, April 30, 2026 - Kick start your summer plans with the Sweet Summer Savings promo from Divi Resorts. Explore breathtaking destinations in the Caribbean while keeping your accommodation costs affordable.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Apple Climbs On Earnings, Sandisk Skids; Stock Market At High
data.description: Following record highs in the stock market due to strong earnings and decreased oil prices, Apple, Sandisk, and Roku were significant players. Dow Jones Futures saw an increase with Apple showcasing a rise in earnings, while Sandisk experienced a decline. This surge indicates a positive trend in the market.

data.title: Xi'an showcases smart city governance model
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on April 30, 2026, representatives from seven countries came together at the 2026 Global Mayors Dialogue to discuss digitalization and efficiency in city governance. Mayors and government officials participated in sharing valuable insights. The event took place in Shaanxi and covered important topics for modern urban management.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Rachel L. Ivory as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: Rachel L. Ivory has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her impactful work in Education and Literature, as announced on April 30, 2026, in Las Vegas. Dr. Ivory, renowned for her leadership in these areas, has been featured in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions.

data.title: Lone Star Funds Announces Transformational Dual Acquisitions of RadiciGroup’s High Performance Polymers and Specialty Chemicals Businesses and DOMO Engineered Materials
data.description: In several global cities - Dallas, New York, London, Tokyo, Milan, and Bergamo, Italy, Lone Star Funds revealed that an affiliate of Lone Star Fund XII, L.P. finalized the purchase of RadiciGroup, including its High Performance Polymers and Specialty Chemicals specialties. Additionally, they have formally agreed to acquire DOMO Engineered Materials (DOMO EM), a segment of DOMO Group, with the completion of this transaction anticipated soon. The acquisitions are part of Lone Star's strategic investments in the polymer and chemicals sectors.

data.title: World's First Immersive Acrobatics Theme Park Opens in Wuqiao, China
data.description: In Cangzhou, China, on April 30, 2026, Wuqiao County inaugurated the Wuqiao Acrobatics Fantasy Park. This expansive immersive theme park brings to life a longstanding performance tradition of the region, offering visitors a fully interactive experience.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Realberry/
data.description: Realberry has announced the commencement of vertical construction on Avenue South, a new mixed-use district spanning 140 acres at Centerra. The development is set to transform the landscape and offer new opportunities for growth in the area. The construction milestone marks a significant step forward in the realization of this project. The announcement came on 28-Apr-2026, with Realberry clarifying that there was incorrect information initially shared, which has since been rectified. Stay updated for further progress on this exciting project that is set to make a notable impact on the community and economy.

data.title: Hydreight Reports Record Fiscal 2025 Results as VSDHOne Drives Rapid Growth and Platform Scale
data.description: Hydreight Technologies Inc. has reached a significant milestone by becoming profitable and expanding its reach with over 11,000 platform licenses. The company has also bolstered its financial position with $15.7 million in cash. Operating primarily in the U.S., Hydreight Technologies Inc. is traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol NURS, on the OTCQB market with the symbol HYDTF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the symbol SO6.

data.title: First National Bank Alaska declares dividend for second quarter 2026
data.description: A cash dividend of $4.00 per share was declared at the recent Board of Directors meeting on April 29, 2026, in Anchorage, Alaska. This dividend will be payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as of June 1, 2026.
